title: Bergen Heavy Rain
lead: Bergen is experiencing heavy rain with a critical level. The Z-Score of -3.57 indicates a significant anomaly.
body:
The current weather conditions in Bergen are characterized by heavy rain, with an score of 10.0/10 and a level of CRITICAL. 
 The relative humidity is at 92% and the wind speed is 12.2 km/h. 
 The HDD is 13.5 GG and the CDD is 0.0 GG, indicating a significant impact on heating demands.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to ensure public safety
